title: EB has update, CC on the latest - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will NOT be displayed
scenario: Charge Chase popup card incorrectly displayed on Device Home screen after earbud firmware update via app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the earbuds (EB) have a firmware update available and the Charge Chase (CC) is on the latest firmware version.
3. Initiate the earbuds firmware update from the Home screen.
4. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
5. After the update completes, return to the Device Home screen.
6. Observe whether the Charge Chase popup card is displayed on the Device Home screen.
expected: The earbuds firmware update completes successfully. After returning to the Device Home screen, the Charge Chase popup card is NOT displayed.
